'''鈭歞-ng-k''' ('''kadangak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quetch|quetch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quetch|quetch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadangak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangak|thidangak]] || [[word:jidangak|jidangak]] || [[word:shidangak|shidangak]] || [[word:kidangak|kidangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangak|thuthudangak]] || [[word:jujudangak|jujudangak]] || [[word:shushudangak|shushudangak]] || [[word:kukudangak|kukudangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudangak|thudangak]] || [[word:judangak|judangak]] || [[word:shudangak|shudangak]] || [[word:kudangak|kudangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudangak|thudangak]] || [[word:judangak|judangak]] || [[word:shudangak|shudangak]] || [[word:kudangak|kudangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedangak|thedangak]] || [[word:jedangak|jedangak]] || [[word:shedangak|shedangak]] || [[word:kedangak|kedangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodangak|thothodangak]] || [[word:jojodangak|jojodangak]] || [[word:shoshodangak|shoshodangak]] || [[word:kokodangak|kokodangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangak|thodangak]] || [[word:jodangak|jodangak]] || [[word:shodangak|shodangak]] || [[word:kodangak|kodangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangak|thodangak]] || [[word:jodangak|jodangak]] || [[word:shodangak|shodangak]] || [[word:kodangak|kodangak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]] || [[word:dangak|dangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dangak|th忙dangak]] || [[word:j忙dangak|j忙dangak]] || [[word:sh忙dangak|sh忙dangak]] || [[word:k忙dangak|k忙dangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadangak|thathadangak]] || [[word:jajadangak|jajadangak]] || [[word:shashadangak|shashadangak]] || [[word:kakadangak|kakadangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangak|thadangak]] || [[word:jadangak|jadangak]] || [[word:shadangak|shadangak]] || [[word:kadangak|kadangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangak|thadangak]] || [[word:jadangak|jadangak]] || [[word:shadangak|shadangak]] || [[word:kadangak|kadangak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadangak|shadangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadangak|goshadangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadangak|gokishadangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadangakn眉|shadangakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadangaknkn眉|goshadangaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangakn眉|gokishadangakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadangaksh毛|shadangaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadangaknksh毛|goshadangaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadangaksh毛|gokishadangaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangakro|shadangakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangaknkro|goshadangaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangakro|gokishadangakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangakmu|shadangakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangaknkmu|goshadangaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangakmu|gokishadangakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadangaksher|shadangaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadangaknksher|goshadangaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadangaksher|gokishadangaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadangakng|shadangakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadangaknkng|goshadangaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadangakng|gokishadangakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadangakya|shadangakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadangaknkya|goshadangaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadangakya|gokishadangakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadangakyam|shadangakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadangaknkyam|goshadangaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadangakyam|gokishadangakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangakn眉sh毛|shadangakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangaknkn眉sh毛|goshadangaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangakn眉sh毛|gokishadangakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangakn眉ro|shadangakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangaknkn眉ro|goshadangaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangakn眉ro|gokishadangakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangakn眉mu|shadangakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangaknkn眉mu|goshadangaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangakn眉mu|gokishadangakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangaksh毛n眉|shadangaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangaknksh毛n眉|goshadangaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangaksh毛n眉|gokishadangaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangaksh毛ro|shadangaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangaknksh毛ro|goshadangaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangaksh毛ro|gokishadangaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangaksh毛mu|shadangaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangaknksh毛mu|goshadangaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangaksh毛mu|gokishadangaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangakron眉|shadangakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangaknkron眉|goshadangaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangakron眉|gokishadangakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangakrosh毛|shadangakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangaknkrosh毛|goshadangaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangakrosh毛|gokishadangakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangakromu|shadangakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangaknkromu|goshadangaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangakromu|gokishadangakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangakmun眉|shadangakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangaknkmun眉|goshadangaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangakmun眉|gokishadangakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangakmush毛|shadangakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangaknkmush毛|goshadangaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangakmush毛|gokishadangakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangakmuro|shadangakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangaknkmuro|goshadangaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangakmuro|gokishadangakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
